name: ASRock B550M-ITX/ac Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI - DisplayPort - Realtek GbE LAN - Intel 802.11ac Wi-Fi - BT 4.2
shortName: ASRock B550M-ITX/ac Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: ASRock B550M-ITX/ac mini-ITX motherboard for compact builds with WiFi and Bluetooth support.
